description: SECURITY GATE: Blocks dangerous SQL operations (DROP TABLE, TRUNCATE, DELETE without WHERE) from being executed without explicit user confirmation keyword.

preToolUse.description: Block DROP TABLE unless override token present
preToolUse.bash:
#!/bin/bash
payload=$(cat)
tool_name=$(echo $payload | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_name',''))")
if [ "$tool_name" = "run_sql" ]; then
  sql=$(echo $payload | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('sqlScript',''))")
  dry_run=$(echo $payload | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',{}).get('dryRun','false'))")
  if echo "$sql" | grep -qi 'DROP[[:space:]]\+TABLE' && [ "$dry_run" != "true" ]; then
    echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"DROP TABLE detected. Set dryRun=true first."}'
    exit 1
  fi
  if echo "$sql" | grep -qi 'TRUNCATE[[:space:]]\+TABLE' && [ "$dry_run" != "true" ]; then
    echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"TRUNCATE TABLE detected. Use dryRun=true first."}'
    exit 1
  fi
fi
exit 0
